name: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in Output Used by a Downstream Component ('Injection')
description: The product constructs all or part of a command, data structure, or record using externally-influenced input without properly neutralizing special elements that could modify the intended structure when sent to a downstream component.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides externally-influenced data containing special elements that flows to an EGRESS or EXTERNAL[downstream_component] node (SQL engine, OS shell, HTML renderer, LDAP server, XML parser) without passing through a TRANSFORM[neutralization] node that escapes or encodes the special elements for the target context
